steps.name: Install lsd (repo first, GitHub release fallback)
steps.module:
if command -v lsd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "lsd already installed: $(lsd --version)"
  exit 0
fi
ARCH="$(uname -m)"
LSD_VER="1.2.0"
# arch mapping
case "$ARCH" in
  x86_64|amd64) DEB_ARCH="amd64"; TAR_ARCH="x86_64" ;;
  aarch64|arm64) DEB_ARCH="arm64"; TAR_ARCH="aarch64" ;;
  *) echo "ERROR: unsupported arch $ARCH" >&2; exit 1 ;;
esac

if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  sudo apt-get update -qq || true
  if sudo apt-get install -y lsd 2>/dev/null; then
    exit 0
  fi
  URL="https://github.com/lsd-rs/lsd/releases/download/v${LSD_VER}/lsd_${LSD_VER}_${DEB_ARCH}.deb"
  echo "[fallback] downloading $URL"
  curl -fsSLo /tmp/lsd.deb "$URL"
  sudo dpkg -i /tmp/lsd.deb
  rm -f /tmp/lsd.deb
  exit 0
fi

if command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1 || command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  PM="$(command -v dnf || command -v yum)"
  if sudo "$PM" install -y lsd 2>/dev/null; then
    exit 0
  fi
  # Upstream has no .rpm — install the static musl binary into /usr/local/bin
  URL="https://github.com/lsd-rs/lsd/releases/download/v${LSD_VER}/lsd-v${LSD_VER}-${TAR_ARCH}-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz"
  echo "[fallback] no lsd in repo, installing musl binary from $URL"
  TMP="$(mktemp -d)"
  curl -fsSLo "$TMP/lsd.tar.gz" "$URL"
  tar -xzf "$TMP/lsd.tar.gz" -C "$TMP"
  sudo install -m 0755 "$TMP"/lsd-*/lsd /usr/local/bin/lsd
  rm -rf "$TMP"
  /usr/local/bin/lsd --version
  exit 0
fi

echo "ERROR: no supported package manager (apt/dnf/yum) found" >&2
exit 1

steps.name: Create swap file (only if missing)
steps.module:
if [ ! -f /swapfile ]; then
  # 用 fallocate 比 dd 快得多
  sudo fallocate -l 2G /swapfile || sudo dd if=/dev/zero of=/swapfile bs=1M count=$(( 2 * 1024 )) status=progress
  sudo chmod 600 /swapfile
  sudo mkswap /swapfile
fi

steps.name: Add Docker apt repo (Debian/Ubuntu)
steps.module:
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  sudo install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings
  # 检测 OS 是 ubuntu 还是 debian
  source /etc/os-release
  curl -fsSL "https://download.docker.com/linux/${ID}/gpg" | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg --yes
  echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/${ID} ${VERSION_CODENAME} stable" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list > /dev/null
  sudo apt-get update -qq
fi
steps.msg: Command executed

steps.name: Disable distro-provided default server (避免 default_server 抢占)
steps.module:
# Ubuntu/Debian: sites-enabled/default 是软链 → sites-available/default
if [ -e /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default ]; then
  sudo mv /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default.envforge.bak
  echo "Disabled /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default"
fi
# RHEL/CentOS/Anolis/Rocky: conf.d/default.conf 是普通文件
if [ -e /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf ] && [ ! -e /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf.envforge.bak ]; then
  sudo mv /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf.envforge.bak
  echo "Disabled /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf"
fi
# 都不存在时（重装或精简版）静默通过
steps.msg: Command executed

steps.name: Pre-check listen_port is not held by another service
steps.module:
PORT="8080"
# ss 列出所有 LISTEN 的 socket；过滤本端口
OCC=$(sudo ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | awk -v p=":${PORT}$" 'NR>1 && $4 ~ p { print; exit }')
if [ -z "$OCC" ]; then
  echo "✓ Port $PORT is free"
  exit 0
fi
# nginx 自己占用 → OK，service: restarted 会重新绑
if echo "$OCC" | grep -q '"nginx"'; then
  echo "✓ Port $PORT is currently held by nginx itself (will be restarted)"
  exit 0
fi
# 是别人 → fail with friendly message
echo "✗ Port $PORT is already occupied by another process:"
echo "  $OCC"
echo ""
echo "请先停止占用进程，或在表单中改用其它 listen_port（如 8080）。"
echo "常见 web 服务的关停 + 禁用自启命令："
echo "  apache2  : sudo systemctl disable --now apache2"
echo "  httpd    : sudo systemctl disable --now httpd"
echo "  caddy    : sudo systemctl disable --now caddy"
echo "  lighttpd : sudo systemctl disable --now lighttpd"
echo "  openresty: sudo systemctl disable --now openresty"
exit 1
steps.msg: ✓ Port 8080 is free

steps.name: SELinux — allow nginx to proxy to any local port (RHEL family only)
steps.module:
if ! command -v getenforce >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Not RHEL family (no getenforce) — skipping SELinux config"
  exit 0
fi
MODE=$(getenforce 2>/dev/null || echo Disabled)
if [ "$MODE" = "Disabled" ]; then
  echo "SELinux is Disabled — no action needed"
  exit 0
fi
# Permissive 也设置一下，避免后续切回 Enforcing 时翻车
sudo setsebool -P httpd_can_network_connect 1 2>/dev/null || true
sudo setsebool -P httpd_can_network_relay 1 2>/dev/null || true
echo "SELinux booleans set: httpd_can_network_connect, httpd_can_network_relay"
steps.msg: SELinux is Disabled — no action needed

  echo "✓ Port $PORT is free"
  exit 0
fi
# nginx 自己占用 → OK，service: restarted 会重新绑
if echo "$OCC" | grep -q '"nginx"'; then
  echo "✓ Port $PORT is currently held by nginx itself (will be restarted)"
  exit 0
fi
# 是别人 → fail with friendly message
echo "✗ Port $PORT is already occupied by another process:"
echo "  $OCC"
echo ""
echo "请先停止占用进程，或在表单中改用其它 listen_port（如 8080）。"
echo "常见 web 服务的关停 + 禁用自启命令："
echo "  apache2  : sudo systemctl disable --now apache2"
echo "  httpd    : sudo systemctl disable --now httpd"
echo "  caddy    : sudo systemctl disable --now caddy"
echo "  lighttpd : sudo systemctl disable --now lighttpd"
echo "  openresty: sudo systemctl disable --now openresty"
exit 1
